{{Infobox character
| name = Steward (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
| name = Steward (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| aliases = Captain (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Steward, Captain
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

''See also: [[Steward (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Steward]] is a high-ranking leadership position within the [[Aurelian Empire]], currently held by [[Calder]] [[Marten]]. The role serves as a caretaker and protector of the people, acting as a placeholder on the throne until a true Emperor can be officially declared. While the position is intended to unify the various [[Guilds]] and defend against threats from the [[Elders]], it can also be viewed as a temporary administrative role. [[Calder]] [[Marten]] holds this title while simultaneously serving as the Captain of the ship known as [[The Testament]]. In his capacity as Steward, he represents the empire in official addresses and manages significant crises, such as celestial anomalies. The role involves wearing imperial regalia, including the [[Emperor's armor]] and a silver crown, though it exists alongside other powers such as an [[Imperial Regent]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Captain is a rank that can be confused between [[Navigator]] captains and military captains.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is a Captain.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] holds the title of Steward, a role through which he communicates by sending messages via senior [[Guards]]. Following an incident that leaves the Steward's body pulseless and bleeding, his armored form must be stripped. During these events, a little girl with hair even redder than the Captain's is present. Although [[Jerri]] addresses [[Calder]] as the Captain, he contemplates reclaiming his former position as Steward to eventually further his grudge against [[Shera]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Steward sends messages through senior [[Guards]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Steward is a title or role held by [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Steward's body was bleeding and he had no pulse.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Steward's body is wearing armor that needs to be removed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The little girl has hair redder than the Captain's.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] considers reclaiming the Steward's position as a way to pursue his grudge against [[Shera]] later.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] refers to [[Calder]] as the Captain.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“You should recognize when a battle is lost, Captain.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“We need you to get the armor off the Steward’s body without breaking it,” Rosephus said to the room.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“I’d like a moment with my…uh, the Captain.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
